families.name: scalar predicate projection and aggregation shapes

variants.name: ordered multi-column scalar projection

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.group = 'shape' return n.name, n.score order by n.name

variants.name: ordered projection with skip and limit

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.group = 'shape' return n.name order by n.name skip 1 limit 1

variants.name: distinct scalar projection

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.group = 'shape' return distinct n.department order by n.department

variants.name: coalesce fallback predicate

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where coalesce(n.alias, n.name) = 'delta' return n.name

variants.name: list membership and string suffix predicate

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.name in ['alpha', 'gamma'] and toLower(n.objectid) ends with '-500' return n.name order by n.name

variants.name: empty literal list membership returns no rows

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.name in [] return n.name

variants.name: array quantifier predicate

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where any(tag in n.tags where tag contains 'admin') return n.name order by n.name

variants.name: all quantifier over empty property list is true

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.group = 'shape' and all(tag in n.tags where tag contains 'admin') return n.name

variants.name: none quantifier over missing property list is not true

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.group = 'missing-tags' and none(tag in n.tags where tag contains 'admin') return n.name

variants.name: none quantifier over null property list is not true

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.group = 'null-tags' and none(tag in n.tags where tag contains 'admin') return n.name

variants.name: empty list equality excludes missing and null property lists

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.group in ['shape', 'missing-tags', 'null-tags'] and n.tags = [] return n.name

variants.name: negated empty list inequality excludes missing and null property lists

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.group in ['shape', 'missing-tags', 'null-tags'] and not n.tags <> [] return n.name

variants.name: property is null matches missing and json null values

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.group in ['missing-tags', 'null-tags'] and n.tags is null return n.name order by n.name

variants.name: property is not null excludes json null values

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.group = 'null-tags' and n.tags is not null return n.name

variants.name: property is not null includes empty list values

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.group in ['shape', 'missing-tags', 'null-tags'] and n.tags is not null return n.name order by n.name

variants.name: coalesced missing null and empty property lists match zero size

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.group in ['shape', 'missing-tags', 'null-tags'] and size(coalesce(n.tags, [])) = 0 return n.name order by n.name

variants.name: unwind coalesced property lists skips missing null and empty lists

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.group in ['shape', 'missing-tags', 'null-tags'] with n unwind coalesce(n.tags, []) as tag return n.name, tag order by n.name, tag

variants.name: contains percent treats percent as a literal character

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.group = 'wildcard' and n.name contains '%' return n.name

variants.name: starts with underscore treats underscore as a literal character

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.group = 'wildcard' and n.name starts with 'under_' return n.name

variants.name: size of empty literal list is zero

vars.query: return size([])

variants.name: size of coalesced missing and null property lists is zero

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.group in ['missing-tags', 'null-tags'] return n.name, size(coalesce(n.tags, [])) order by n.name

variants.name: grouped aggregate row projection

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.group = 'shape' return n.department, count(n), sum(n.score) order by n.department

variants.name: aggregate aliases can be filtered and ordered

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.group = 'shape' with count(n) as node_count, sum(n.score) as score_total where node_count >= 1 return node_count, score_total order by score_total

variants.name: parameterized aggregate alias filter

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.group = 'shape' with count(n) as node_count where node_count >= $minimum return node_count

variants.name: grouped min max and avg aggregate row projection

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.group = 'shape' return n.department, min(n.score), max(n.score), avg(n.score) order by n.department

variants.name: single-row aggregate tuple projection

vars.query: match (n:TemplateNodeKind1) where n.group = 'shape' return count(n), count(distinct n.department), min(n.score), max(n.score), avg(n.score)
